title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the state of autonomous code generation and agents, presenting features like /goal and /Mission for managing extended coding tasks. He demonstrates prompt strategies and tools like Crewlet and Superdesign that enable autonomous development workflows.
